title: Water treatment plant SCADA (UI)
description: Golden vertical SCADA walkthrough for water treatment.
prompt: Build a water treatment SCADA: intake pump, clarifier basin, effluent flow meter, overview dashboard, and a turbidity/high-flow alert for operators.
uiJourney: AI Studio or Explorer create → Dashboard → Alarms → Operator
humanSteps: Create intake pump, clarifier, and effluent flow meter devices (generator or Explorer).
Build overview dashboard with those tags.
Add alert; open Operator and Alarms to confirm.
